nasb.text: Yet on your fathers did the Lord set His affection to love them, and He chose their descendants after them, even you above all peoples, as it is this day.

esv.text: Yet the Lord set his heart in love on your fathers and chose their offspring after them, you above all peoples, as you are this day.

cnv.text: 但耶和華只喜悅你的列祖，愛他們；他從萬民中揀選了他們的後裔，就是你們，像今日一樣。

ccb.text: 但耶和华只喜爱你们的祖先，从万族中拣选了他们的后裔——你们，正如今日的情形。
